property.name: fs.defaultFS
property.description: The primary HDFS NameNode URI endpoint

property.name: io.file.buffer.size
property.description: Size of read/write buffer used in sequence files. Must be a multiple of hardware page size (4KB). 128KB is standard for modern network/storage systems.

property.name: ipc.server.handler.queue.size
property.description: Number of call queue items per handler thread. Prevents Client RPC requests from being dropped under high load.

property.name: ipc.client.connection.maxidletime
property.description: Max idle time in milliseconds before client drops connection.

property.name: ipc.client.connect.max.retries
property.description: Max retries for IPC connections before throwing connection exception.

property.name: net.topology.script.file.name
property.description: Script mapping hostnames to rack locations for block replica placement.
